# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent postgres weak auth.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

# PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration for production deployment
# Secure authentication rules for application database

# Local connections
local   all             all                                     peer

# IPv4 local connections
host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            md5

# IPv6 local connections
host    all             all             ::1/128                 md5

# Application server connections - admin role
host    appdb           admin           10.0.0.0/16             scram-sha-256
host    appdb           admin           172.16.0.0/12           scram-sha-256
host    appdb           admin           192.168.0.0/16          scram-sha-256

# Application server connections - app role
host    appdb           app             10.0.0.0/16             scram-sha-256
host    appdb           app             172.16.0.0/12           scram-sha-256
host    appdb           app             192.168.0.0/16          scram-sha-256

# Application server connections - readonly role
host    appdb           readonly        10.0.0.0/16             scram-sha-256
host    appdb           readonly        172.16.0.0/12           scram-sha-256
host    appdb           readonly        192.168.0.0/16          scram-sha-256

# Replication connections
host    replication     replicator      10.0.0.0/16             scram-sha-256
host    replication     replicator      172.16.0.0/12           scram-sha-256
host    replication     replicator      192.168.0.0/16          scram-sha-256

# Default fallback - reject all other connections
host    all             all             0.0.0.0/0               reject
host    all             all             ::/0                    reject
